message: Task created. Implementer: antigravity. Goal: Create a durable workflow where Codex plans and reviews, Antigravity implements, and future agents can coordinate through shared task briefs and messages.
Added AGENTS.md, .agent-hub protocol docs, role briefs, task template, task state, message log, and scripts/agent-hub.js. Added npm run agent for shared task operations.
Verified npm run agent -- help and npm test. Existing npm test only prints No automated tests yet, so this setup is CLI-smoke-tested rather than covered by automated assertions.
Phase changed to done. Current owner: codex.
Task created. Implementer: antigravity. Goal: Implement shapes, text editor, selection transforms, pages, spotlight, and magnifier
Phase changed to done. Current owner: antigravity.
Completed Sprint 1 (Trustworthy MVP) and Sprint 2 (Features 7-12) including Spotlight and Magnifier tools. All tests and syntax checks passed.
Task created. Implementer: antigravity. Goal: Redesign toolbar into an Epic Pen style vertical floating glassmorphic palette with flyout menus, draggable header, and collapsible state
Phase changed to plan. Current owner: antigravity.
Created implementation plan to transform the toolbar into a vertical floating glassmorphic palette like Epic Pen Pro, with flyout color/shape menus, draggable header, and collapsible minimized mode.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: antigravity.
Starting execution of Epic Pen Pro vertical UI redesign following user approval.
Phase changed to verify. Current owner: antigravity.
All syntax checks passed with zero errors. Toolbar transformed into vertical floating glassmorphic palette with draggable header, circular tools, and flyout menus.
Phase changed to handoff. Current owner: antigravity.
Completed Epic Pen Pro style UI redesign. Window positioned along screen edge with transparent click-through background.
Task created. Implementer: antigravity. Goal: Add native full RGB/Hex color picker and Horizontal/Vertical palette orientation toggle
Phase changed to plan. Current owner: antigravity.

Plan: 1. Add native HTML5 color input (<input type=color>) next to curated color swatches in toolbar.html and wire it in toolbar.js. 2. Add H/V orientation toggle button to toolbar header, dynamically updating CSS classes (.pen-bar.horizontal) and adjusting window bounds in main.js via IPC if needed.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: antigravity.

Phase changed to plan. Current owner: codex.

Phase changed to verify. Current owner: codex.

Task created. Implementer: antigravity. Goal: Fix WebP export, multi-monitor screenshot targeting, batched multi-selection undo history, activeShapeType persistence, incomplete hotkey settings surface, and UI text encoding artifacts (mojibake)
Phase changed to analysis. Current owner: codex.
Phase changed to plan. Current owner: codex.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: codex.
Phase changed to verify. Current owner: codex.
Phase changed to handoff. Current owner: codex.
Task created. Implementer: antigravity. Goal: Fix options sidebar getting cut off and implement dynamic 4-way docking flyout placement (left/right/top/bottom) based on monitor edge.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: antigravity.
Task created. Implementer: codex. Goal: Make the Overlay Ink toolbar size closer to the Epic Pen reference, improve icon polish, inspect UI/UX shortcomings, and record verification evidence.

Read architecture, QA checklist, recent toolbar tasks, toolbar HTML/CSS/JS, and main toolbar window sizing. Key findings: toolbar icon button is being overwritten with Hide/Show Overlay text, causing the tall wrapped label; visible toolbar cells are 32px inside a 40px bar, smaller than the Epic Pen reference (~48px cells/~52px strip); dropdown indicator and whiteboard emoji labels contain mojibake; icon sizes/strokes are inconsistent and too small; automated tests are placeholders, so visual/manual QA is needed.
Phase changed to analysis. Current owner: codex.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: codex.

Plan: 1) prevent toggleOverlayBtn from being overwritten with text and update it through title/aria-label/icon state instead; 2) resize visible vertical toolbar to ~52px wide with ~44px cells and 22px icons to match the Epic Pen reference while preserving grouped tools; 3) sharpen icon presentation with consistent stroke, active/focus states, and no text overflow; 4) make swatches and custom color area fit the larger strip; 5) run syntax/test checks and visual static render, then record UI/UX shortcomings and improvement recommendations.

Review findings: fixed the screenshot-visible wrapped Hide Overlay label by removing the fallback that made toggleOverlay point at toggleOverlayBtn; this also prevents duplicate click registration on the same icon button. The toolbar now preserves icon-only buttons with accessible labels. Remaining product/UI shortcomings: toolbar still carries many functions in one rail; some custom SVG metaphors (spotlight/magnifier/whiteboard) need a dedicated icon set pass; no automated UI tests exist; Electron visual capture was unreliable in this environment, so manual QA on Windows remains required.

Changed src/renderer/toolbar.css to use Epic Pen-like visible proportions: 52px strip, 44px tool cells, 23px icons, tighter 2px tool gaps, larger 44px brand cell, 52px horizontal mode height, stronger active/focus states, CSS triangle group indicators, and larger swatches/custom color slot. Changed src/renderer/toolbar.js so the real toggleOverlayBtn is no longer treated as the legacy text button; it now updates title/aria-label/muted state and switches eye/eye-off SVGs. Changed src/renderer/toolbar.html to add ARIA labels, empty CSS-driven group indicators, and plain whiteboard popover labels instead of emoji labels.
Phase changed to review. Current owner: codex.
Phase changed to verify. Current owner: codex.

Verification: node -c passed for main.js, src/renderer/toolbar.js, src/renderer/overlay.js, and src/preload.js. npm test ran successfully but is a placeholder that prints No automated tests yet. Source audit confirmed CSS tokens --bar-width:52px, --tool-cell:44px, --tool-icon:23px; actual toggleOverlayBtn keeps SVG content and is no longer overwritten by text; group indicators are empty CSS triangles; whiteboard popover labels are plain text. Browser visual QA was blocked by in-app Browser URL policy for data: and file: targets. Desktop/offscreen Electron screenshots were attempted but did not yield reliable toolbar evidence in this environment; manual Windows QA remains needed.

Handoff: toolbar sizing/icon polish changes are implemented in toolbar.html, toolbar.css, and toolbar.js. User should run npm start and visually confirm the rail now sits near Epic Pen scale with no wrapped Hide Overlay text. Recommended next work: dedicated icon family refresh, add UI smoke tests for toolbar state, reduce tool overload with mode presets or secondary panel, and improve manual QA coverage for multi-DPI/multi-monitor toolbar placement.
Phase changed to handoff. Current owner: codex.
Task created. Implementer: codex. Goal: Inspect every toolbar/tool workflow, identify broken or substandard behavior, and produce a detailed prioritized plan to correct the issues.
Phase changed to analysis. Current owner: codex.

Tool audit findings: toolbar markup no longer exposes hide/show overlay, select, redo, page/session controls, click halo, or text mode controls even though JS/main/settings still reference several of them. Static ID audit found 26 getElementById refs missing from toolbar.html. Highlighter rendering is broken-risk: overlay.js declares const ctx then render() reassigns ctx to window.hlCtx for highlighter compositing, which will throw when highlighter strokes/previews render. Cursor toolbar button only calls setPassThrough(true), so it is one-way and cannot toggle back to draw mode. Text tool title/QA says sticky note/Ctrl+Enter/word wrap, but toolbar exposes no sticky/plain selector, overlay commits on Shift+Enter/Escape, and render only splits explicit newlines. Select exists in overlay/main/hotkeys/tray but not toolbar; Delete/Backspace selection deletion likely fails because non-text overlay windows are setFocusable(false). Eraser ignores single-click erase and deletes whole strokes/shape bounding boxes. Pen auto-shape recognition is always on with no toolbar setting. Screenshot/export uses window/screen capture rather than deterministic scene compositing, so background+annotation export can include/exclude wrong layers depending OS capture behavior. Settings/hotkey labels disagree with toolbar titles for undo (Ctrl+Z vs Ctrl+Shift+Z).
Phase changed to plan. Current owner: codex.

Correction plan: Phase 0 add minimal automated coverage/static contracts for toolbar IDs and IPC channels. Phase 1 fix blockers: highlighter ctx crash, one-way cursor button, restore hide/show/select/redo toolbar controls, align undo shortcut labels, and ensure overlay focus/keyboard behavior supports Delete/Backspace for select. Phase 2 repair core tools: pen/highlighter/eraser/text/select/shapes with explicit acceptance tests; add single-click erase, real highlighter opacity, text word-wrap and Ctrl+Enter commit, and shape icon/title updates. Phase 3 repair presentation/background/export: make laser/spotlight/magnifier click-through standards explicit, improve magnifier DPI/live capture, persist/restore background intentionally, and rebuild screenshot export as capture desktop + render scene + composite, excluding toolbar. Phase 4 UX standards: reduce stale controls, add tool capability matrix, add confirmation/undo affordances, and run full manual QA checklist on Windows including multi-DPI/multi-monitor.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: antigravity.
Starting implementation of Steps 1 and 2: Core bug fixes (highlighter context, bidirectional cursor toggle, restored toolbar buttons, stale DOM cleanup) and automated static contract test suite.
Task created. Implementer: codex. Goal: Diagnose why toolbar tools stopped working, starting from Graphify hints, and restore tool selection/drawing behavior with verification.
Phase changed to analysis. Current owner: codex.

Graphify highlighted toolbar/main state paths. Live check found src/renderer/toolbar.js fails node -c with SyntaxError: Unexpected end of input at EOF. Missing closure after updatePills/export background block means the toolbar renderer script never loads, so tool buttons do not call IPC. Existing npm test passed because it does not syntax-check renderer JS.
Phase changed to plan. Current owner: codex.
Plan: close updatePills in toolbar.js, add a lightweight JS syntax verification script for main/preload/renderers/scripts, wire it into npm test, then run node -c checks and npm test.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: codex.

Fixed toolbar renderer syntax by closing updatePills after export background state update. Added scripts/verify-js-syntax.js and wired it into npm test. Registered missing toolbar elements (penBar, orientationBtn, collapseBtn, whiteboardPopover) and declared legacy optional controls as null/empty arrays so element handlers are explicit. Extended DOM verifier to catch elements.* references missing from the registry.
Phase changed to review. Current owner: codex.

Review found the primary outage was a syntax error in toolbar.js that prevented all toolbar JS from loading. Also found silent no-op risk for orientation/collapse/whiteboard controls due missing elements registry entries; fixed and added verifier coverage. No unrelated files changed beyond package test wiring and verification scripts.
Phase changed to verify. Current owner: codex.

Verification passed: npm test now runs JS syntax, DOM IDs/elements registry, IPC contract, and tool state alignment. node -c passed for toolbar.js, overlay.js, and main.js. Hidden Electron smoke launch stayed alive for 5 seconds.
Phase changed to handoff. Current owner: codex.

Ready for user/manual QA. Please restart RePen and test Pen, Highlighter, Shapes, Eraser, Select, Spotlight/Magnifier, Whiteboard popover, orientation toggle, and collapse. Remaining risk: no automated UI click test exists for Electron toolbar interactions.
Task created. Implementer: codex. Goal: Fix annotation leakage between non-transparent whiteboard pages and transparent desktop overlay, especially when returning to transparent mode or relaunching.
Phase changed to analysis. Current owner: codex.

Inspected main.js page/scene state. The app has separate desktopPage and pages stores, and setBackgroundMode generally swaps between them. Found loadState restores annotations from board pages when persisted backgroundMode is non-transparent, then unconditionally resets state.backgroundMode to transparent without repointing annotations back to desktopPage. That can make board annotations render on transparent desktop after relaunch/return-to-transparent flows.
Phase changed to plan. Current owner: codex.

Plan: make transparent startup explicitly bind annotations/undo/redo to desktopPage after forcing backgroundMode transparent, add a regression verifier that detects this ordering, wire it into npm test, then run full test and syntax checks.
Phase changed to implementation. Current owner: codex.

Updated main.js loadState(): after forcing startup backgroundMode to transparent, it now also rebinds annotations/undoStack/redoStack to desktopPage. Added scripts/verify-scene-store-separation.js and wired it into npm test to guard loadState and setBackgroundMode scene-store transitions.
Phase changed to review. Current owner: codex.

Review: root cause was stale active annotations pointer. When persisted state came from a board mode, loadState selected pages[currentPageIndex].annotations, then reset backgroundMode to transparent without switching the active scene back to desktopPage. That made board annotations appear on normal desktop. setBackgroundMode already has the correct split, and verifier now asserts both paths.
Phase changed to verify. Current owner: codex.
Verification passed: npm test including JS syntax, DOM IDs/elements, IPC contract, tool state, and scene-store separation. Hidden Electron smoke launch stayed alive for 5 seconds.

Ready for manual QA. Test: draw on transparent desktop, switch to whiteboard/grid and draw different marks, switch back to transparent and confirm only desktop marks show; switch back to board and confirm board marks are preserved. Relaunch after board use and confirm transparent starts with desktop marks only.

Reorganized Board/Background UI: Main toolbar whiteboard popover now only shows Whiteboard and Blackboard options. In board mode, the toolbar icon changes to a transparent return button. In board mode, the top overlay navigation (#boardNav) displays board pattern buttons (Plain, Grid, Ruled, Staff) and color swatches (including custom color picker). Dynamic contrast added for pattern lines.
Removed redundant pasteImgBtn from #boardNav in overlay.html and overlay.js based on user feedback. Ctrl+V / Cmd+V keyboard listener remains intact for image pasting.
